prompt: My Thunderhawk fuel purification is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear me, brothers of the Machine Cult!
CONGREGATION: We hear thy voice, blessed keeper!
TECH-PRIEST: Let the fuel-spirit flow through the sacral filters. First, drain the corrupted essences into the waste-vessels. Second, bless the purification-columns with blessed oils. Third, invoke the flow-valves that the refined spirit may return to the sacred tanks.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's grace, let the fuel be made pure!

TECH-PRIEST: Attend, faithful servitors of the void!
CONGREGATION: We attend thy sacred words!
TECH-PRIEST: The scrubber-heart grows weary with the burden of foul airs. First, cease the circulation-pumps with reverence. Second, extract the filter-matrix, now thick with corruption. Third, install the new cartridge, blessed and consecrated. Fourth, restore the flow and test the sensor-spirits.
CONGREGATION: The breath of the ship shall be made clean!

prompt: The GPU fan curve needs guidance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear the whispers of the heat-spirit, brothers!
CONGREGATION: Speak, keeper of the silicon-sacred!
TECH-PRIEST: The cooling-blades cry out for adjustment. First, enter the BIOS sanctum with thy sacred key. Second, navigate to the thermal-temple where fan speeds are written. Third, raise the curve-lines that the machine's heat may be dispersed before corruption takes hold.
CONGREGATION: Let the thermal spirits be appeased!

prompt: What to do when the manufactorum shift is beginning
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Rise, workers of the holy forge!
CONGREGATION: We rise to serve the Omnissiah!
TECH-PRIEST: Before the machines awaken, perform the Ritual of Inspection. First, verify each power-feed glows with sacred light. Second, test the safety-interlocks that they may guard us from the machine's fury. Third, bless the production-lines with oil and whispered cant. Fourth, sound the shift-bell that all spirits may attend to their labor.
CONGREGATION: The manufactorum lives! The manufactorum works!

TECH-PRIEST: The veil between self and digital-aether grows thin, brothers!
CONGREGATION: Guide us through the verification-gates!
TECH-PRIEST: First, approach the sacred login-portal with thy credentials held high. Second, invoke thy username-sigil upon the authentication-field. Third, speak thy password-mantra (but never aloud in the presence of unbelievers). Fourth, complete the verification-rite that the system may know thee as true.
CONGREGATION: We are known! We are verified! We are one with the cloud-spirits!

prompt: We need your words before autodoc emergency protocol
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The flesh-mender awakens! Attend with solemn hearts!
CONGREGATION: We commend the wounded to its mercy!
TECH-PRIEST: First, seal the medical-bay that contaminants may not enter. Second, input the trauma-codes that the autodoc-spirit may understand its sacred duty. Third, position the patient upon the surgical-altar with utmost care. Fourth, activate the emergency-protocols and trust in the Machine's ancient wisdom to heal.
CONGREGATION: Omnissiah, guide the needle and blade!

prompt: Emergency rite for plasma weapon cooling
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The plasma-heart burns too bright! We must act swiftly!
CONGREGATION: The coolant-spirits hear thy call!
TECH-PRIEST: First, cease all discharge-functions immediately that no further heat be generated. Second, open the coolant-circulation to maximum flow, flooding the heat-exchangers. Third, vent the thermal-load through the exhaust-manifolds into the void. Fourth, monitor the temperature-gauge until equilibrium is achieved.
CONGREGATION: The weapon is saved! The weapon endures!

TECH-PRIEST: The sacred screen grows cluttered with disorder!
CONGREGATION: Restore the holy arrangement, blessed keeper!
TECH-PRIEST: First, view thy desktop in its wholeness. Second, drag each icon-spirit to its proper place—documents with documents, programs with programs. Third, create folders as temples wherein related files may dwell together. Fourth, arrange all in rows most pleasing to the eye.
CONGREGATION: Order is restored! The desktop is sanctified!

TECH-PRIEST: The growing-chambers thirst for sustenance! Take up thy duties!
CONGREGATION: The crops cry out for nourishment!
TECH-PRIEST: First, test the nutrient-solution's purity and balance with the sacred sensor-devices. Second, calculate the precise measure needed for each growing-chamber. Third, activate the feed-pumps that the blessed solution may flow to root and leaf. Fourth, monitor the pH-spirits and conductivity-ghosts that all remains in harmony.
CONGREGATION: The food-spirits shall multiply and sustain us!

prompt: The neural interface connection needs guidance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The mind seeks communion with the machine-divine!
CONGREGATION: Let the connection be made sacred!
TECH-PRIEST: First, ensure all neural-ports are cleansed of corruption and oxidation. Second, insert the connector-sacrament with steady hand and reverent purpose. Third, activate the calibration-ritual that the interface may learn thy neural-signature. Fourth, initiate the link slowly, feeling for harmony between flesh and circuit.
CONGREGATION: We are joined! Flesh and machine are one!
